prestazioni: Engine: M930/60 (3.3L flat-six, air-cooled, single KKK K27 turbocharger) – Full rebuild with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from LN Engineering for 1.5-bar boost capability.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT35R with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 60mm compressor wheel, paired with a Tial 44mm external wastegate and a custom intercooler from Bell Intercoolers (3.5" core thickness, 100% aluminum construction).

Fuel System: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a custom Motec M150 ECU with individual cylinder tuning for the M930/60’s air-cooled architecture, including a dual-map ignition system with MSD 6AL-2 CDI box and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.024".
estetica: Body: Rothsport Racing widebody conversion kit (935-style fenders, 100mm rear flares) with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser from 935 Works, finished in Porsche ‘Petrol Blue’ (908-5) with matte black accents.
Wheels: BBS RS 010 17x9.5" (front) and 17x11" (rear) with custom offsets (-15mm front, -25mm rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear).

Interior: Full Recaro SRD Evo II carbon fiber seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay from Rennline with Smiths analog gauges (boost, oil temp, fuel pressure).
